brand.name: MyTown
brand.description: Premium local services discovery and booking platform for Pontypridd, Wales.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-900
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-slate-800

accent.description: Warm Ochre for CTAs and highlights. Feels trustworthy and premium.

business_cards.style: solid flat background, 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), zero or subtle ambient shadow, sharp or max rounded-md.

category_chips.style: bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-700 text-sm font-medium rounded-full px-4 py-2 transition-colors inline-flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer

booking_widget.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm. Use Shadcn calendar. Clean, dense, data-focused layout.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-amber-600 text-white hover:bg-amber-700 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:border-slate-900 rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-colors

empty_states.style: Minimalist text and functional CTA. No cartoonish illustrations. Use Phosphor or Lucide icons in a large, muted color (text-slate-300) centered above the text.

inputs.style: Shadcn defaults customized with rounded-md, border-slate-300, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-transparent.

marketing_site.hero: Mobile-first, asymmetrical or grid-based (Bento Grid Mode A). High contrast imagery, overlaid with text (max bg-black/40 overlay). Use strong typography and generous padding.
marketing_site.sections: Alternating background colors (white to stone-50). Deep navy footer with oversized typography.

dashboards.manager: Strict control-room grid (Bento Mode B). Dense spacing. Sticky sidebar on desktop, bottom nav or hamburger on mobile. Data tables for users/businesses.
dashboards.business: Sidebar navigation. Highlight inbox/bookings and calendar availability. Flat cards for metrics.
dashboards.customer: Simplified dashboard. Focus on upcoming bookings and past reviews. Clean list views.

motion.hover: Subtle transform and shadow shifts. transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion.list_items: Staggered entrance using Framer Motion (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0).

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1). Dark slate text on light backgrounds.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='book-now-button').

media.instructions: Use these exact URLs for placing real imagery in the application. Do not use placeholder services. Treat tradespeople with respect (professional, high-quality imagery).

hero_backgrounds.description: Charming Victorian-style terraced houses in UK, showcasing classic architecture. Use for Pontypridd/local location context.
Wales town street view. Good for local community pages or about us.

tradespeople.description: Close-up of a plumber's hands installing steel pipes indoors, showcasing skilled manual work. Good for plumbing category.
Technician working on circuit breaker panel. Good for electrician category.
Hands applying plaster to a wall with trowels. Good for decorating/plastering category.

tools_and_details.description: Handheld tool lot. Good for handyman category or general platform features.
Close-up of a tool bag with various items inside. Excellent for background textures or general service sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the selected fonts: Cabinet Grotesk for headings, Manrope for body. DO NOT use Inter or Space Grotesk.
Do not use generic SaaS gradients or purple palettes. Stick to the Slate and Ochre/Amber palette.
Create a solid, grid-based layout for dashboards, minimizing white space but maintaining clear section borders.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `data-testid` attribute.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing sections to ensure creative layouts, but rely on customized Shadcn components for forms, modals, and data tables.
Always apply a dark transparent overlay (e.g. bg-slate-900/40) over hero images to guarantee text readability.
